items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario regarding graceful degradation when the agent is confused.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior when the agent is confused, but there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates how this scenario is handled within the system. The linked use cases and prior steps indicate various requirements related to delivery scenarios, but none specifically address the behavior of the agent in a confused state. Therefore, the evidence is inconclusive regarding whether the requirement is satisfied.
